cloud_logging_config.description: Specifies the configuration for logging DNS queries. Must be a map with keys such as 'enableLogging' indicating whether query logging is enabled.

description.description: Specifies a user-defined description for the DNS managed zone. Can be up to 1024 characters long.

dns_name.description: The DNS name for the managed zone, must end with a dot (e.g., 'example.com.').

dnssec_config.description: Configuration for DNSSEC settings, including key signing and zone signing details for the managed DNS zone.
dnssec_config.type: list(object({kind: optional(string),non_existence: optional(string),state: optional(string),default_key_specs: list(object({algorithm: optional(string),key_length: optional(number),key_type: optional(string),kind: optional(string)}))}))

force_destroy.description: Determines whether to permanently delete the managed zone and all its associated resources, bypassing the recycle bin.

forwarding_config.description: Configuration for forwarding DNS queries to specific target name servers; requires valid target name servers for setup.

labels.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize resources, typically for filtering, grouping, or identifying purposes; must be unique within the project.

name.description: Defines the name of the DNS managed zone, which must be unique within the project and adhere to Google's naming conventions.

peering_config.description: Specifies the network peering configuration for the managed zone, required when creating a private zone that uses a network.

private_visibility_config.description: Defines the visibility settings for the managed zone, specifying configurations for private DNS zones, including associated networks.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout settings for the creation, update, and deletion operations of the DNS managed zone.

visibility.description: Specifies whether the managed zone is publicly visible or private.
